name: libubertooth1
title: libubertooth1
description:
Shared library for Bluetooth experimentation
Project Ubertooth is an open source wireless development platform suitable for
Bluetooth experimentation. Ubertooth ships with a capable BLE (Bluetooth Smart)
sniffer and can sniff some data from Basic Rate (BR) Bluetooth Classic
connections.
.
This package provides the shared library needed by Ubertooth.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libubertooth1 because Shared library for Bluetooth experimentation.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libubertooth1 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libubertooth1 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libubertooth1 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
